title: rhododendron indicum var. kaempferi
intro: Rhododendron indicum var. kaempferi, also known as the Korean azalea or Kaempferi rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the rhododendron family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and relieving digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Rhododendron indicum var. kaempferi is prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
